seo.title: Tres Amigos | Mexican Street Food Amsterdam
seo.description: Tres Amigos Amsterdam. Real Mexican street food met tacos, burritos, bowls en bestelopties per vestiging.
seo.menuDescription: Bekijk het Tres Amigos menu met tacos, burritos, quesadillas, bowls, sides en desserts.

hero.title: Fresh Mexican street food.
hero.intro: Burritos, tacos, quesadillas, bowls and loaded sides from four Amsterdam locations. Simple to browse, fast to order.

footer.title: Eat like a Mexican
footer.intro: Real Mexican street food by real Mexicans. Fast service, fresh food and a clear Amsterdam ordering experience.

videosSection.title: Street food in beweging.
videosSection.intro: Korte verticale beelden die rustig laten zien wat je kunt verwachten: warme tacos, snelle service en een herkenbare Tres Amigos sfeer.

videos.title: Beef tacos
videos.caption: Zachte tortillas, pulled beef en frisse toppings.

videos.title: Tres Amigos sfeer
videos.caption: Een korte blik op de energie achter de toonbank.

videos.title: Fresh from the kitchen
videos.caption: Casual, vers en snel klaar voor je bestelling.

items.name: XL Pulled Beef tacos
items.description: Three big soft shell slow cooked pulled beef tacos with pickled red onions, cilantro and Mexican cheese.

items.name: XL Pulled Chicken tacos
items.description: Three big soft shell slow cooked pulled chicken tacos with red onions, chipotle sauce, cilantro and Mexican cheese.

items.name: XL Jackfruit tacos
items.description: Three soft shell tacos filled with homemade BBQ jackfruit, cheese and cilantro.

items.name: Fried fish tacos
items.description: Three soft shell tacos with fried white fish, lettuce, pico de gallo, red onions, lime sauce, guacamole and cilantro.

items.name: Pulled chicken burrito
items.description: Pulled chicken, cheese, rice, pinto and black beans, chipotle, red onions and coriander.

items.name: Ground beef burrito
items.description: Ground beef, rice, pinto and black beans, chipotle, cheese and cilantro.

items.name: White fish burrito
items.description: White fish of the day with lime sauce, rice, tomato, red onion, slaw and guacamole.

items.name: Jackfruit burrito
items.description: Homemade BBQ jackfruit, beans, cheese and rice.

items.name: Vegan burrito
items.description: Beans, rice, sweet corn, fresh lime juice, red onions, cilantro, guacamole and lettuce.

items.name: Pulled chicken quesadilla
items.description: Mexican pulled chicken, homemade chipotle sauce, cheese, red onions and bell pepper.

items.name: Ground beef quesadilla
items.description: Ground beef, homemade chipotle sauce, cheese, red onions and bell pepper.

items.name: Cheese quesadilla
items.description: Mozzarella, homemade chipotle sauce, cheddar cheese, red onions and bell peppers.

items.name: Spicy pulled chicken bowl
items.description: Rice base, chipotle pulled chicken, kidney beans, bell peppers, red onion, jalapeno and spicy chipotle sauce.

items.name: Vegan Jackfruit bowl
items.description: Savory jackfruit, kidney beans, crisp bell peppers, red onion and creamy guacamole.

items.name: Chili con carne bowl
items.description: Kidney beans, ground beef, sweet corn, pico de gallo, sour cream and homemade garlic sauce.

items.name: Mozzarella sticks
items.description: Portion of 5 cheese sticks filled with mozzarella cheese.

items.name: Twister fries
items.description: Big portion seasoned curly fries.

items.name: Chili cheese nuggets
items.description: Portion of 6 nuggets filled with bell pepper and cheese.

items.name: Fries
items.description: Big portion seasoned fries.

items.name: Cheesecake
items.description: New York style cheesecake.

items.name: XL Chocolate chip cookie
items.description: Homemade chocolate chip cookie baked golden with gooey chocolate chunks.

items.name: Fudge brownie
items.description: Rich homemade fudge brownie with intense chocolate.
